pi_items.verified_value: Simulated/synthetic medical device adapters with controllable vital signs parameters
pi_items.source: OpenICE documentation: device simulators generate synthetic vital signs data controlled by 'Simulation Control' app; no real device data

privileged_info_summary: The clinical_event_log_monitor task operates on OpenICE 2.0 (MD PnP's open-source medical device integration framework). The task requires agents to monitor synthetic vital signs data generated by simulated device adapters (Multiparameter Monitor, Pulse Oximeter, etc.) running in the OpenICE Supervisor application. Log files are generated at /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log in standard Log4j format (timestamp, level, logger, message). The task requires agents to analyze these logs, create a monitoring script at /home/ga/Desktop/event_monitor.sh, generate output summaries at /home/ga/Desktop/event_summary.txt, and document observed log patterns in /home/ga/Desktop/log_format_doc.txt. All device data is synthetic and controllable. Minimum 2 distinct simulated device adapters must be created. Java 17 and Gradle build system are required dependencies.
